REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-12-2011 - ****CASE DISMISSED PER ORDER OF THE COURT.**** NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED FOR NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206) *******DISMISSAL IS VACATED PER JUDGE MILLER'S RULING OF MAR-15-2012. SEE MINUTES. SEE ALSO ORDER FILED ON 4/20/12.**********
OPPOSITION TO MTN TO VACATE DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LEMBI, FRANK E.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-15-2012 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL OF ACTION, RESTORE THIS CASE TO THE CIVIL ACTIVE LIST. STEVEN REVITZ APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. EDWARD SINGER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. MICHAEL SWEET APPEARING AS BANKRUPTCY TRUSTEE. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS UNDER CCP 473 THAT THE DISMISSAL ENTERED ON THE TRIAL CALL OF 12/12/11 WAS THE RESULT OF INADVERTENCE MISTAKE AND LACK OF KNOWLEDGE OF THE PLAINTIFF, THEREFORE THE DISMISSAL IS VACATED AND THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO BE STAYED IN LIGHT OF THE BANKRUPTCY STAY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANK LEMBI. A CASE MANAGEMENT IS SET FOR 5/18/12 AT 2:00PM IN DEPT. 610 AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
